task-1775162764454-mnxczy.description: Analyze http://www.rallyeclub-klostertal.at and build a modern cinematic single-page website. Steps: 1) Research the existing site - extract brand colors, content, events, results. 2) Design a modern responsive layout with cinematic scroll animations using GSAP and ScrollTrigger. 3) Build a single HTML file with sections: Hero with rally imagery, About/Club History, Events, Results, Gallery, Contact. Use cinematic modules from /home/clawbot/.openclaw/workspace/cinematic-site-components/ as reference. Mobile-first, modern design. 4) Deploy to Vercel.
